_provenance.aggregationScope: all 20 extracted pages (cross-page), home-only for logo/voice/heroImage
_provenance.notes: Consent-banner CTAs (Accept All, Customise, Necessary…) were filtered from CTA aggregation. Brand surface aggregated across all extracted pages to avoid home-page bias.

site.name: Moneyhub
site.registerBasis: Marketing/landing site for a B2B open-finance data platform; sells solutions/products to financial institutions.
site.positioning: We collect, enrich and contextualise customer data so that financial institutions can drive better customer outcomes.

logo.description: Moneyhub wordmark, lowercase, with an orange angular 'M'/hub glyph accent (#EF5520).

palette.name: Moneyhub Orange
palette.usage: accent text highlight, primary buttons, section headings, geometric motif, link accents

palette.name: Slate Ink
palette.usage: headings, dark color-block section backgrounds, footer

palette.name: White
palette.usage: primary page background, cards, text on dark blocks

scaleAudit.note: h1 64 / h2 48 / h3 32 — clean descending scale

borderRadius.note: Sharp, square-cornered design. Buttons ~2px; occasional 100% (circular avatars) and 20px (rare). The square edge is a deliberate corporate-fintech signature.

shadows.note: Near-flat; minimal/absent drop shadows. Depth comes from color-block contrast, not elevation.

patterns: confetti-geometric (floating orange triangles + grey rounded blobs around heroes)
alternating full-bleed color-block sections (white / slate / orange)

voice.leadParagraph: We collect, enrich, and contextualise the data fragments. Enabling you to deliver intelligent personalised financial journeys and drive better customer outcomes.
voice.tone: Confident, plain-spoken, outcome-oriented B2B. Short imperative headlines; benefit-led body copy aimed at product/CX leaders at banks, lenders, pension and wealth providers.
voice.heroImage: https://moneyhub.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/moneyhub-logo.png (og:image is the logo; the live hero is a white canvas with geometric confetti, not a photo)

header.description: Sticky top nav. White on load; an orange (#EF5520) condensed bar appears on scroll. Left: Moneyhub wordmark. Center/right: top-level nav. Right: CONTACT button.

footer.description: Dark slate (#293338) footer with link columns and office details.
footer.office: London Office: 70 Gracechurch Street, London, UK EC3V 0HR
